zh.lifeSummary: 當Baroness Joan De Venables於大約1412年出生在英國斯塔福爾時，她的父親Sir Hugh Venables29歲，母親Baroness Cecily Dutton18歲。她於1431年與Sir Richard Cotton在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1456年4月23日在英國倫敦享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Baroness Joan De Venables于大约1412年出生在英国斯塔福爾时，她的父亲Sir Hugh Venables29岁，母亲Baroness Cecily Dutton18岁。她于1431年与Sir Richard Cotton在英国英格兰斯塔福爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1456年4月23日在英国倫敦享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Venables
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: of Norman origin, a habitational name from Venables (Eure), perhaps named with Late Latin venabulum ‘hunting ground’ (a derivative of venari ‘to hunt’).

variants.name: Venable
meanings: History: American bearers of this name are descended from Abraham Venables, who came to VA from England in or before 1687.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Baroness Joan De Venables was born about 1412, in Staffordshire, England, her father, Sir Hugh Venables, was 29 and her mother, Baroness Cecily Dutton, was 18. She married Sir Richard Cotton in 1431, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 23 April 1456, in London, England, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Baroness Joan De Venables est née environ 1412, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Hugh Venables, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Baroness Cecily Dutton, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Richard Cotton en 1431, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 23 avril 1456, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Baroness Joan De Venables um 1412 in Staffordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Hugh Venables 29 und ihre Mutter Baroness Cecily Dutton 18. Sie hat 1431 in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir Richard Cotton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 23. April 1456 im Alter von 45 Jahren in London, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Joan De Venables è nata il circa 1412 nel Staffordshire, England, sua padre, Sir Hugh Venables, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Baroness Cecily Dutton, aveva 18 anni. Lei sposato Sir Richard Cotton nel 1431, nel Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 23 aprile 1456, nel London, England, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Baroness Joan De Venablesが約1412年にイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir Hugh Venablesは29歳，母Baroness Cecily Duttonは18歳であった。1431年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアでSir Richard Cottonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1456年4月23日にイギリスロンドンで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Baroness Joan De Venables(이)가 대략 1412년 영국 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Hugh Venables(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Baroness Cecily Dutton(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 1431년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 Sir Richard Cotton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1456년 4월 23일 영국 런던에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Baroness Joan De Venables nasceu aproximadamente 1412, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Hugh Venables, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Baroness Cecily Dutton, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Richard Cotton em 1431, em Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 23 de abril de 1456, em London, Inglaterra, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Baroness Joan De Venables родилась около 1412 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Hugh Venables было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Baroness Cecily Dutton, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Richard Cotton в 1431 г. в местности стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 23 апреля 1456 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 45 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Baroness Joan De Venables nació aproximadamente 1412, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Hugh Venables, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Baroness Cecily Dutton, tenía 18 años. Se casó con Sir Richard Cotton en 1431, en Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 23 de abril de 1456, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 45 años.
